hero.title: Zaruret Records
hero.subtitle: We discover artists, shape production, build the stage. A next-generation music house.

sections.showreelSubtitle: A curated look at our work

label.title: Label
label.desc: Artist discovery, publishing, A&R and catalogue management.

studio.title: Studio
studio.desc: Professional recording, mixing and mastering facility.

production.title: Production
production.desc: Single, EP and album production. Arrangement and creative direction.

events.title: Events
events.desc: Concert and stage production. From booking to live execution.

footer.newsletterDesc: Stay in the loop on new releases and events.

roster.title: Roster
roster.intro: Innovative voices on the Zaruret roster. Artists who define their own language and push boundaries.

releases.title: Releases
releases.intro: Every release in our catalogue. Singles, EPs and albums.

studio.title: Studio
studio.intro: A professional recording environment where analog warmth meets digital precision.
studio.comingSoonBody: Zaruret Studio is currently under construction. Hardware installations and acoustic treatment are being finalised. Follow along for the opening date and booking availability — the gear you'll see below will be ready on day one.

services.title: Services
services.intro: From idea to release, we're with you at every stage. A structure that protects the artist's voice while carrying it to the world.
services.ctaBody: Send a demo or reach out about a project. We typically respond within 3–5 business days.

events.title: Events
events.intro: Zaruret live productions. Concerts, festivals, special nights.

about.title: About
about.intro: Zaruret Records is a multi-arm house for independent music.
about.missionBody: To amplify artists' voices while protecting their creative freedom. A model that blends traditional label structure with the modern independent music economy.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Submit a demo, book the studio, or drop us a line.
contact.bookingSoonTitle: Studio booking is not open yet.
contact.bookingSoonBody: Zaruret Studio is currently under construction. Online booking will go live with the opening. Until then, feel free to use the general contact form to discuss a project.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your message is in. We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
